text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's Manhattan Cafe! She's crept up to the front,
and she's finished in first!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: WHOOOAAAA...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: She ran so naturally it was practically... supernatural! The crowd is baffled at this turn of events!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was a firm finish the likes of which I've never
seen from her before.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The daily grind that took us through spring and
summer has finally borne fruit.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer! My friend... My friend!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
She was... right in front of me! I've never gotten
so close to her in a race before!
choice_data_list: Congratulations. Did you see her face?

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I didn't get that close. But...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: I was almost there. And even after running today's race, I feel totally fine...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Is this... me? This...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She whispers, as if she can't believe it. Hearing
her is all the proof I need.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The paranormal phenomena that racked her body
for so long are finally gone.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Heh-heh, hahaha! Yes, this is good. This is it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Everything is in line with my predictions! It's like
getting the perfect amount every time I open a
burette valve!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Don't you think so, Cafe?!

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: This doesn't mean I trusted you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: But it's as you say... I'm glad I didn't push myself too hard in the spring. You can be self-centered, but...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Somewhere in there, you were thinking of me,
too... That's what I felt today.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, is it safe to take that as an expression of
gratitude?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, either way. What say we keep this up?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha, this is where we accelerate! Faster and faster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Relishing in our victory, we return to my office
and get to work on our next plan.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Honestly... I don't think there's anything wrong
with my body. Now that I've managed to run all
3,000 meters...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
I think I can make it... through the autumn races,
and the winter ones...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, well. You sure have toughened up, haven't
you, Cafe?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What will you do, Trainer? The Kikuka Sho and
the Classics are both over, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How about this? Why not take on the best of the
senior-year racers? The Japan Cup would be your
earliest shot at that...
choice_data_list:
I'd rather hold out a little longer for the Arima
Kinen.

I'd rather hold out a little longer for the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hm, and what's behind that decision?
choice_data_list: I want her to rest at least a little.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's not just that I want her to rest. After seeing
today's race, I'm starting to think that a slightly
longer race would be best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Japan Cup is 2,400 meters, while the Arima
Kinen is 2,500. It's only a hundred-meter gap,
but it could make all the difference.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Oho, a very nice idea! Those are the eyes of a
strategist. Looks like my intellect might just be
rubbing off on you.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
All right... The Arima Kinen... I'm not sure who my
competition will be, though.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
That's where I'll catch up to my friend. And we
should be able to end this year by realizing our
dream...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Your friend, you say... Chasing your dreams is
good and all, but the Arima Kinen is no run in the
park.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You'll be competing against runners at the top of
their game. It's almost like... they're different
lifeforms altogether...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
And this is the Arima Kinen we're talking about... I
expect those two will be making an appearance.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The two seniors currently ranked highest. They're
snapping up first and second position in every
race.
Ah! Aah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Aaaah! Ha ha haaa!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Eeeeek! Opera O, wh-what was that just now?
Were you about to sneeze?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, my ears are burning. Someone must be
gossiping about us.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I thought it a fan singing my praises, but
apparently not. I'm sensing something ominous
about.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eep? When you say "ominous"...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The Twinkle Series! One who lurks beneath the
dazzling theater stage on which we dance.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: An unknowable phantom has appeared... One seeking to upend our performance.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that Manhattan Cafe is on a trajectory to
the Arima Kinen, new rivals await her.
